sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69684" key="nakotilte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νᾰκο-τιλτέω</orth>, <sense id="n69684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pluck</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shear off wool</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
